# Implement Feature (Reference Entrypoint)

Use canonical guidance from:

1. `#file:../copilot-instructions.md`
2. `docs/shared/guides/workflow-governance.md`
3. `docs/local/guides/development-guidelines.md`
4. `docs/local/guides/architecture-standards.md`
5. `docs/local/guides/coding-standards.md`
6. `docs/shared/Specifications/`

Manual fallback only when primary orchestration is unavailable:

1. Confirm feature scope and affected contracts.
2. Implement with strict layer boundaries and typed models.
3. Add/update tests for behavior and integration impact.
4. Run quality gates before completion.
5. Update docs and issue notes together with implementation.
